headline: Jim Cramer Says He Bets “The Gains in CVS Will Be Long-Lasting”
summary: CVS Health Corporation (NYSE:CVS) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation. Cramer showed a positive sentiment toward the stock, as he said: How about these outsized moves in the health insurers and the drug distributors? Oh, I like these. I bet […]
